prompt: Open ~/Desktop/kinbench/298-doc.pages in Pages. Find the phrase 'KinBench 298' in the document body, select it, and make it bold (Cmd+B). Save the file. You may use the helper: cerebellum 'pages bold_selection' after selecting the text. When done, write the file ~/Desktop/kinbench/298-bold-confirm.txt containing the word 'done'.
